en: If your company is required to comply with Ireland Statutory Labor Insurance, you will be asked to provide relevant documents in a subsequent form(s).
Ireland Statutory Labor Insurance Applicability Assessment

Employers are legally obliged to ensure that the correct amount of PRSI is deducted from their employees and they are required to remit it, together with the PRSI which the employer is liable to pay, to the Revenue Commissioners under the PAYE system.
Is your company required to comply with Ireland's Pay Related Social Insurance (PRSI) requirement and maintain applicable documentation to show compliance?
The company consists entirely of workers temporarily assigned to Ireland who have documentation issued by the appropriate authority in their home country and are willing to provide it upon request
The company is a sole proprietorship with an annual income below €5,000
